new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Post-launch energy
new_queue.name: What's contributing to your current energy levels post-launch?
new_queue.description: Explores the reasons behind Priya's current energy state and any potential factors impacting it.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Refactor success
new_queue.name: What specifically about the payments refactor are you proud of?
new_queue.description: Encourages Priya to reflect on her achievements and what made the project successful.

new_queue.label: Mentoring vision
new_queue.name: What would you want mentoring to look like in your schedule?
new_queue.description: Surfaces Priya's interest and vision for her involvement in mentoring activities.

new_queue.label: Billing rewrite readiness
new_queue.name: Where do you think your skills would be most valuable in the billing rewrite?
new_queue.description: Encourages Priya to consider her future involvement and how her skills align with upcoming projects.

new_queue.label: Support needs
new_queue.name: What support do you need from me right now?
new_queue.description: Directly asks Priya what support she requires, ensuring alignment with her needs.

new_queue.label: Prioritisation trade-offs
new_queue.name: What are you choosing to deprioritise to focus on current goals?
new_queue.description: Identifies areas Priya is consciously deprioritising, revealing her prioritisation process.

new_queue.label: Growth opportunities
new_queue.name: What areas do you see as growth opportunities in your current role?
new_queue.description: Explores Priya's perception of growth within her role and where she sees potential for development.
